added_fields.vendor_id: ObjectId (ref Vendor) - helps query ad spend/refund transactions for a vendor
added_fields.description: string - human readable reason shown in UI

amount_convention.backward_compatibility: older deduction records may have positive amount; APIs normalize debit types to negative for UI

budget_fields.total_budget_coins: total budget reserved from vendor wallet at ad creation
budget_fields.total_coins_spent: coins spent from ad budget due to user engagements (like/view/save/comment/reply)

Wallet.meaning: Unallocated coins for a user. For vendors, ad creation reserves budget by deducting from wallet. Ad engagement spend updates Ad.total_coins_spent.

does: Backfill WalletTransaction.description as empty string when missing
Normalize deduction-type WalletTransaction.amount to negative if stored as positive
Backfill WalletTransaction.vendor_id using Ad.vendor_id when ad_id is present
